quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston S. Churchill

quote: He has achieved success who has lived well, laughed often, and loved much.
author: Bessie Anderson Stanley

quote: I can't give you a sure-fire formula for success, but I can give you a formula for failure: try to please everybody all the time.
author: Herbert Bayard Swope

quote: If at first you don't succeed, try, try again. Then quit. No use being a damn fool about it.
author: W.C. Fields

quote: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: It is better to fail in originality than to succeed in imitation.
author: Herman Melville

quote: Success is getting what you want, happiness is wanting what you get.
author: W. P. Kinsella

quote: Failure is the condiment that gives success its flavor.
author: Truman Capote

quote: The worst part of success is trying to find someone who is happy for you.
author: Bette Midler

quote: Have no fear of perfection - you'll never reach it.
author: Salvador Dali

quote: Success is stumbling from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston S. Churchill

quote: If A is a success in life, then A equals x plus y plus z. Work is x; y is play; and z is keeping your mouth shut.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Don't spend time beating on a wall, hoping to transform it into a door.
author: Coco Chanel

quote: I'm a success today because I had a friend who believed in me and I didn't have the heart to let him down.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Sometimes it takes a good fall to really know where you stand.
author: Hayley Williams

quote: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Oliver Goldsmith

quote: All you need in this life is ignorance and confidence; then success is sure.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Happiness is not the absence of problems, it's the ability to deal with them.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: A thinker sees his own actions as experiments and questions. Success and failure are for him answers above all.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: It is hard to fail, but it is worse never to have tried to succeed.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: A man is a success if he gets up in the morning and gets to bed at night, and in between he does what he wants to do.
author: Bob Dylan

quote: Success is most often achieved by those who don't know that failure is inevitable.
author: Coco Chanel

quote: Let the improvement of yourself keep you so busy that you have no time to criticize others.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
author: Robert F. Kennedy

quote: At the end of the day, let there be no excuses, no explanations, no regrets.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Kites rise highest against the wind, not with it.
author: Winston S. Churchill

quote: Whatever the mind can conceive and believe, it can achieve.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Supreme excellence consists of breaking the enemy's resistance without fighting.
author: Sun Tzu

quote: We are all failures—at least the best of us are.
author: J.M. Barrie

quote: Judge your success by what you had to give up in order to get it.
author: Dalai Lama XIV

quote: The difference between a successful person and others is rather a lack in will.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
author: Bill Cosby

quote: Our greatest fear should not be of failure but of succeeding at things in life that don't really matter.
author: Francis Chan

quote: Always bear in mind that your own resolution to succeed is more important than any one thing.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: The biggest challenge after success is shutting up about it.
author: Criss Jami

quote: The three great essentials to achieve anything worthwhile are, first, hard work; second, stick-to-itiveness; third, common sense.
author: Thomas A. Edison

quote: You’re not obligated to win. You’re obligated to keep trying to the best you can do everyday.
author: Jason Mraz

quote: Never was anything great achieved without danger.
author: Niccolo Machiavelli

quote: Success does not consist in never making mistakes but in never making the same one a second time.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: The only time you fail is when you fall down and stay down.
author: Stephen Richards

quote: Success is a state of mind. If you want success, start thinking of yourself as a success.
author: Joyce Brothers

quote: Gather courage to believe that you can succeed and leave no stone unturned to make it a reality.
author: Dr Roopleen

quote: Failure is a bend in the road, not the end of the road. Learn from failure and keep moving forward.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: My past has not defined me, destroyed me, deterred me, or defeated me; it has only strengthened me.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: If I cannot do great things, I can do small things in a great way.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote: Winners are not afraid of losing. People who avoid failure also avoid success.
author: Robert T. Kiyosaki

quote: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection.
author: Bernard Branson

quote: Great Leaders Create More Leaders.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: Eighty percent of success is showing up.
author: Woody Allen

quote: Don't mistake activity with achievement.
author: John Wooden

quote: The universe gives you what you demand with your actions.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: When you take risks you learn that both success and failure are equally important.
author: Ellen DeGeneres

quote: If at first you don't succeed, destroy all evidence that you tried.
author: Steven Wright

quote: People rarely succeed unless they have fun in what they are doing.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: Success, after all, loves a witness, but failure can't exist without one.
author: Junot Díaz

quote: Fortune sides with him who dares.
author: Virgil

quote: Failures are the stairs we climb to reach success.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: To be successful you need friends and to be very successful you need enemies.
author: Sidney Sheldon

quote: Accepting oneself does not preclude an attempt to become better.
author: Flannery O'Connor

quote: Set yourself free. Confront your fear and turn the mental blocks into building blocks.
author: Dr Roopleen

quote: Persistence. Perfection. Patience. Power. Prioritize your passion.
author: Criss Jami

quote: To be independent of public opinion is the first formal condition of achieving anything great.
author: HEGEL

quote: Success means we go to sleep knowing that our talents were used in a way that served others.
author: Marianne Williamson

quote: Success is a little like wrestling a gorilla. You don't quit when you're tired; you quit when the gorilla is tired.
author: Robert Strauss

quote: You must expect great things of yourself before you can do them.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Vision without execution is just hallucination.
author: Henry Ford

quote: There is no failure except in no longer trying.
author: Elbert Hubbard

quote: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
author: Suzy Kassem

quote: If you believe you can, you might. If you know you can, you will.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: The way of success is the way of continuous pursuit of knowledge.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: The test of success is how high you bounce when you hit the bottom.
author: George S. Patton Jr.

quote: The thermometer of success is merely the jealousy of the malcontents.
author: Salvador Dali

quote: Doing the best at this moment puts you in the best place for the next moment.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Act the way you'd like to be and soon you'll be the way you'd like to act.
author: Bob Dylan

quote: If you fuel your journey on the opinions of others, you are going to run out of gas.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: If you are not the hero of your own story, then you're missing the whole point of your humanity.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: To succeed in life, you need three things: a wishbone, a backbone and a funnybone.
author: Reba McEntire

quote: If you’re in the luckiest one per cent, you owe it to the rest of humanity to think about the other 99 per cent.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Life always begins with one step outside of your comfort zone.
author: Shannon L. Alder

quote: The level of success you achieve will be in direct proportion to the depth of your commitment.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: Integrity is doing what is right and truthful, and doing as you say you would do.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: It's failure that gives you the proper perspective on success.
author: Ellen DeGeneres

quote: Whosoever desires constant success must change his conduct with the times.
author: Niccolo Machiavelli

quote: The secret of success is in turning your life's diary into the best story you possibly can.
author: Douglas Pagels

quote: No matter what your history has been, your destiny is what you create today.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Men are born to succeed, not to fail.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Edit your life frequently and ruthlessly. It's your masterpiece after all.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: Success will be within your reach only when you start reaching out for it.
author: Stephen Richards

quote: A quitter never wins—and a winner never quits.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: The world’s greatest achievers stay focussed on their goals and consistent in their efforts.
author: Dr Roopleen

quote: When you are living the best version of yourself, you inspire others.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: I do not like to repeat successes. I like to go on to other things.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Your success and happiness lie in you.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Don't let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
author: John R. Wooden

quote: The merit of all things lies in their difficulty.
author: Alexandre Dumas

quote: The real glory is being knocked to your knees and then coming back.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: I am not a victim. I have a history of victory.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Anyone who imagines they can work alone winds up surrounded by rivals; no one ascends alone.
author: Lance Armstrong

quote: Who you are tomorrow begins with what you do today.
author: Tim Fargo

quote: It is in your moments of decision that your destiny is shaped.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: If you're not gonna go all the way, why go at all?
author: Joe Namath

quote: The most important thing is to sacrifice what you are now for what you can become tomorrow.
author: Shannon Alder

quote: Those who don't jump will never fly.
author: Leena Ahmad Almashat

quote: Failure is constructive feedback that tells you to try a different approach.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: When you fail, that is when you get closer to success.
author: Stephen Richards

quote: The roughest roads often lead to the top.
author: Christina Aguilera

quote: You may be disappointed if you fail, but you are doomed if you don’t try.
author: Beverly Sills

quote: Don't worry about being effective; just concentrate on being faithful to the truth.
author: Dorothy Day

quote: The whole secret of a successful life is to find out what is one's destiny to do, and then do it.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Go deeper than anybody else—that's how you'll get ahead.
author: Austin Kleon

quote: Nearly only counts in horseshoes and hand-grenades.
author: Neil Gaiman

quote: Success comes from the inside out. To change the outside, you must first change the inside.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: You have succeeded in life when all you really want is only what you really need.
author: Vernon Howard

quote: There is no progress or accomplishment without sacrifice.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: The money you make is a symbol of the value you create.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: It takes nothing to stay in poverty, but everything to break free from it.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: To wake up, take action, and achieve is what true success is all about.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: Doing the tough things sets winners apart from losers.
author: Stephen Richards

quote: To burn always with this hard gemlike flame, to maintain this ecstasy, is success in life.
author: Walter Pater

quote: Do not let your dedication to other people's opinions be greater than your dedication to your emotions!
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: People are successful because they think and act like successful people.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: A vital ingredient of success is not knowing that what you're attempting can't be done.
author: Terry Pratchett

quote: Sharing our weakness and difficulties is more nourishing to others than sharing our successes.
author: Jean Vanier

quote: If your success looks good to the world but does not feel good in your heart, it is not success.
author: Anna Quindlen

quote: No other success can compensate for failure in the home.
author: J. E. McCulloch

quote: The line between failure and success is so fine that we are often on it and do not know it.
author: Elbert Hubbard

quote: When you live your life by poor standards, you inflict damage on everyone who crosses your path.
author: Jordan Belfort

quote: The secret to success is constancy of purpose.
author: Benjamin Disraeli

quote: When beauty is found inside, the search ends and a beautiful journey begins.
author: Harshit Walia

quote: The power to change your life lies in the simplest of steps.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Today is the only day in which we have any power.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Soar with wit. Conquer with dignity. Handle with care.
author: Criss Jami

quote: Fear can only grow in darkness. Once you face fear with light, you win.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Your life is a print-out of your thoughts.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: You can't just wish change; you have to live the change for it to become a reality.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Don't be afraid of failure. This is the way to succeed.
author: LeBron James

quote: Insults only hurt when they come from someone I respect.
author: Kresley Cole

quote: It doesn't matter how great your shoes are if you don't accomplish anything in them.
author: Martina Boone

quote: You only have to do a few things right as long as you don't do too many things wrong.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: There's no reason to have a plan B because it distracts from plan A.
author: Will Smith

quote: I never fail. It's just that the people around me succeed more than I.
author: Carroll Bryant

quote: With one day's reading a man may have the key in his hands.
author: Ezra Pound

quote: If you really want the key to success, do the opposite of what everyone else is doing.
author: Brad Szollose

quote: There is no high greater than challenging the power structure as a nobody and winning!
author: Abbie Hoffman

quote: If you don’t know exactly where you’re going, how will you know when you get there?
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: You will find the key to success under the alarm clock.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying basic fundamentals.
author: E. James Rohn

quote: If you want to give yourself a fair chance to succeed, never expect too much too soon.
author: Po Bronson

quote: Failure today may actually be a crucial step towards the success you seek.
author: Richelle E. Goodrich

quote: Flaming enthusiasm, backed by horse sense and persistence, frequently makes for success.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: It is not as much about who you used to be, as it is about who you choose to be.
author: Sanhita Baruah

quote: One of the most healing things you can do is recognize where in your life you are your own poison.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: What seems to us as bitter trials are often blessings in disguise.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
author: Bruce Feirstein

quote: Life itself is simple... it's just not easy.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: You have been blessed with immeasurable power to make positive changes in your life.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Do not compare yourselves to others. Be true to who you are, and continue to learn with all your might.
author: Daisaku Ikeda

quote: You are where you are right now because of the actions you've taken, or maybe, the inaction you've taken.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Take your victories, cherish them, use them, but don't settle for them.
author: Mia Hamm

quote: There is only one success—to be able to spend life in your own way.
author: Christopher Morley

quote: NEVER be surprised by your own success!
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Your life begins to change the day you take responsibility for it.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Success is a journey, not a destination.
author: Ben Sweetland

quote: Never feel shame for trying and failing for he who has never failed is he who has never tried.
author: Og Mandino

quote: To become successful, one must put themselves in the paths of giants!
author: Lillian Cauldwell

quote: Sometimes not getting what you want is a brilliant stroke of luck.
author: Lorii Myers

quote: Don't waste your time hating a failure. Listen, learn, go on.
author: Clarissa Pinkola Estés

quote: Success is the progressive realization of a worthy ideal.
author: Thomas S. Monson

quote: Success is not a comparison of what we have done with what others have done.
author: Myles Munroe

quote: Today is a new day and it brings with it a new set of opportunities for me to act on.
author: Idowu Koyenikan

quote: Even if you're on the right track, you'll get run over if you just sit there.
author: Will Rodgers

quote: The only real battle in life is between hanging on and letting go.
author: Shannon L. Alder

quote: Success is getting what you want; happiness is wanting what you get.
author: Ingrid Bergman

quote: Go as far as you can see and you will see further.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: At any given moment the choice to be happy is present—we just have to choose to be happy.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: You will succeed if you are fearless of failure.
author: Natalie Goldberg

quote: If you're waiting until you feel talented enough to make it, you'll never make it.
author: Criss Jami

quote: Your agreement with reality defines your life.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Happiness simply cannot be relied upon as a measure of success.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: Stop lying to yourself. When we deny our own truth, we deny our own potential.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Success is a poor teacher.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

quote: Participate in your own dreams, don’t just say what you want or complain about what you don’t have.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Success is doing what you want to do, when you want, where you want, with whom you want.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Success is something you experience when you act accordingly. Success is not something you have, it's something you do.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: No matter how good you get you can always get better, and that's the exciting part.
author: Tiger Woods

quote: When you have faults, do not fear to abandon them.
author: Confucius

quote: Do more, say less.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: The only guarantee for failure is to stop trying.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: You are forgiven for your happiness and your successes only if you generously consent to share them.
author: Albert Camus

quote: Stop giving meaningless praise and start giving meaningful action.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Failure is a greater teacher than success.
author: Clarissa Pinkola Estés

quote: The backbone of success is hard work, determination, good planning, and perseverance.
author: Mia Hamm

quote: Stop allowing your day-to-day life to be clouded by busy nothingness.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Live your vision and demand your success.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: How many people you bless is how you measure success.
author: Rick Ross

quote: If there is no risk, there is no reward.
author: Christy Raedeke

quote: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Free yourself from the complexities of your life! A life of simplicity and happiness awaits you.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Success ... seems to be connected with action. Successful men keep moving.
author: Conrad Hilton

quote: New levels bring new devils.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: We must transcend the illusion that money or power has any bearing on our worthiness.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: If you want to be successful, know what you are doing, love what you are doing, and believe in what you are doing.
author: Will Rogers

quote: More powerful than the will to win is the courage to begin.
author: Orrin Woodward

quote: When you know what you want, and you want it bad enough, you'll find a way to get it.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Learn from your history, but don’t live in it.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: You cannot continue on the same path and arrive at a different destination.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: The speed of your success is limited only by your dedication and what you're willing to sacrifice.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: Don't tie your success to anything other than what's inside you.
author: Debra Anastasia

quote: Action is the universal language of success.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: It's not always that we need to do more but rather that we need to focus on less.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: Success doesn't come to you; you go to it.
author: T. Scott McLeod

quote: The difference between success and failure is not giving up.
author: steven redhead

quote: Many people succeed when others do not believe in them. But rarely does a person succeed when he does not believe in himself.
author: Herb True

quote: Now I know what success is: living your truth, sharing it.
author: Kamal Ravikant

quote: The more you can have control over your ego rather than let it run amuck, the more successful you’ll be.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: It's no use saying, 'We are doing our best.' You have got to succeed in doing what is necessary.
author: Winston S. Churchill

quote: Just pick a goal and stick to it—no big complicated secret.
author: Richelle Goodrich

quote: You measure the size of the accomplishment by the obstacles you have to overcome.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: Luck is a word the bitter teach to the ignorant.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Everything is easier said than done. The challenge and the reward are in the doing.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: While others were dreaming about it—I was getting it done.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: To be successful, you have to be out there, you have to hit the ground running.
author: Richard Branson

quote: You need mountains, long staircases don't make good hikers.
author: Amit Kalantri

quote: We have forty million reasons for failure, but not a single excuse.
author: Rudyard Kipling

quote: When you go in search of honey, you must expect to be stung by bees.
author: Joseph Joubert

quote: You become what you think about.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Notice the difference between being in control and needing control.
author: Marilyn Suttle

quote: Challenges in life can either enrich you or poison you. You are the one who decides.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: A person who makes few mistakes makes little progress.
author: Bryant McGill

quote: Believe in yourself. Under-confidence leads to a self-fulfilling prophecy that you are not good enough.
author: Dr Roopleen

quote: Every beginner possesses a great potential to be an expert in his or her chosen field.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: Results aren't the criteria for success—it's the effort made for achievement that is most important.
author: John Wooden

quote: You have to take your own bold approach, and if you do you will be rewarded with success.
author: Steven Moffat

quote: A real decision is measured by the fact that you've taken a new action.
author: Anthony Robbins

quote: Powerful words come with powerful intent. Where you have passion and determination you can accomplish anything!
author: K.L. Toth

quote: There is no secret ingredient.
author: Mr Ping, Po's father

quote: Every flower blooms at a different pace.
author: Suzy Kassem

quote: If you want to be successful, you must respect one rule. NEVER TO LIE TO YOURSELF.
author: Paulo Cohelo

quote: It is not enough to be busy; so are the ants. The question is: What are we busy about?
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Action is the universal language of success.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: What you do today defines who you will be tomorrow.
author: Debasish Mridha MD

quote: There is no tomorrow and there was no yesterday; if you truly want to accomplish your goals you must engulf yourself in today.
author: Noel DeJesus

quote: Small thinking keeps small businesses small.
author: Mac Duke The Strategist

quote: Succeed On 'Em!
author: Stephanie Lahart

quote: Those who dig for water and give up, make potholes. Those who persist and dig deep, make a well.
author: L.A. Golding

quote: The only secret to success is...YOU!
author: Anthony T.Hincks

quote: Whatever you do, do as an original human – as a master, not as a slave.
author: Abhijit Naskar

quote: The higher the obstacles, the higher we get to rise.
author: Vineet Raj Kapoor

quote: You can cry again or You can try again. Choice is yours.
author: Soham Mondal

quote: Leadership is developed daily, not in a day.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Trust is the foundation of great leadership.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Success isn't important. What's important is that one is happy and doing things one enjoys.
author: Marty Rubin

quote: No matter how gifted a leader is, their gifts will never reach their maximum potential without self-belief.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Success is within the reach of just about everyone.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Excuse Me While I Succeed!
author: Stephanie Lahart

quote: Either you shine in the dark or get lost in the light.
author: Soham Mondal

quote: Self-affirmation is the line drawn between success and failure.
author: Hisham Fawzi

quote: In life there is only one enemy who can stop your dreams - you!
author: Daisy Gallagher

quote: Whatever you strive to do, as long as you do it your best, its enough.
author: Joshua Suya Pelicano

quote: Perception is the beginning of all realization and actualization of possibilities.
author: Abhijit Naskar

quote: Victory in itself expires which is why you must win daily.
author: Awolumate Samuel

quote: There's no success without sacrifice.
author: Jeanette Coron

quote: Don’t wait for perfect conditions because life has no perfect conditions. The secret to success lies in doing more with less.
author: Moffat Machingura

quote: All achievements – all feats of excellence, rise from the protoplasmic realm of the brain.
author: Abhijit Naskar

quote: The ultimate goal is the goal to succeed.
author: Arshad Wahedna

quote: But man's duty is to try and endeavour, success depends upon chance and environments.
author: Bhagat Singh

quote: Think about your future in a positive way and you will move towards your goals.
author: Aurora Berill

quote: Vision is your first creation of the future.
author: Tobi Delly

quote: Adaptability is a most desirable habit or quality for success in life.
author: Sivananda Saraswati

quote: Stay focused. Not every distraction is a worthy detour.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Success comes in cans, not cannots.
author: James Patterson

quote: Problems are the key ingredient in personal growth.
author: 7Cups

quote: If you are too lazy to plow, then you should never expect a harvest.
author: Proverb 20:4

quote: Accomplishing YOUR OWN goals gives YOU the right to dictate YOUR own Success.
author: Marlan Rico Lee

quote: What you think of yourself in your mind is nobody's business. Make it count.
author: Majid Kazmi

quote: Earlier adopters will be ultimate winners.
author: Sukant Ratnakar

quote: Success without happiness is a mirage of life.
author: Debasish Mridha

quote: Don't give up on yourself. Leave that for the other people.
author: Anthony T.Hincks

quote: Each breath we take means that we are a success in life.
author: Anthony T.Hincks

quote: Gunning for the milestone payments is the key to the success of a project.
author: Haresh Sippy

quote: If anyone can make a difference in this life, it's YOU!
author: Anthony T. Hincks

quote: Research is an endless loop of failures interspersed with occasional profound discoveries.
author: Steven Magee

quote: The only way to fail, is when you allow it to happen.
author: Maged Gamani

quote: One of the problems with having time to read all that you want is that your interests become so eclectic it's hard to focus.
author: Karen Arnold

quote: Success is a game which we measure not by the intentions of our opponents, but by the effects of their play.
author: Mapogo Chuene

quote: Think fast, make a decision, do it.
author: Slobodan Boban Manic

quote: Success is continually a relative of sweat.
author: Bharath Mamidoju

quote: The idea that only a few are meant for success or greatness is nothing but a myth.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: The difference between failure and success is conversion.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: You need more faith in self than in God to be successful on earth.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Invest today, so as to get from it the utmost health, happiness and success.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Success is the byproduct of a creative imagination.
author: Debasish Mridha

quote: Success is the ability to live life the way you want without compromising values.
author: Debasish Mridha

quote: Successful people do what they love, not what they are told to do.
author: Gordana Biernat

quote: It is not reputation, wealth, fame, success or religiosity that glorifies God. It's slavery.
author: indonesia123

quote: Success is not a question of how much power or money you have acquired.
author: Gordana Biernat

quote: Success may require a lot of days. But progress only requires one.
author: T. Jay Taylor

quote: Diligence without intelligence is tragedy, not success.
author: Kevin Keenoo

quote: Failure makes Success more appreciable.
author: Idowu Ayodeji

quote: Success is built on hard work, the right hard work itself is success.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Success is not about age, it's about action.
author: Richie Norton

quote: The do-somethings will always be judged by the do-nothings...
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: Don't wait for success to become stronger and confident.
author: Saif Rehman

quote: Faith in God is not a compulsory factor for you to be successful on earth, but you will be a failure in heaven without it.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Mark it. No challenges, no success!
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: God has placed everything in you to succeed.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Time plays a major role in achieving success.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Success is determined by how best you can utilize your time.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Success without a successor is a failure.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: The difference between successful and unsuccessful people is how much value they attach to time.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Falling is not failing. Failing is failing to get back up when you fall.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: Your challenge will never get easier, but you will get stronger if you don’t quit.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: The road for runners is paved with answers, clarity, and peace.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: Runners don’t just run to strengthen their bodies, they run to strengthen their spirits.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: A finish line is never an end; it’s a marker that proves your dreams can become realities.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: Nature makes the best paths that lead to the best places.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: You don't get strong by standing at the finish line; you get strong with every step you take to get there.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: The secret is not following the right path; it's following that right path to the end.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: Success caused passion more than passion caused success.
author: Scott Adams

quote: The road to success begins with knowing what you need to know and why.
author: Savania China

quote: Break the rules not because you don’t know better, but because you know them too well.
author: Savania China

quote: If you want to achieve anything you must first see the result in your own mind before it will become a reality.
author: Donny Ingram

quote: Hatred is exhausting.
author: Savania China

quote: The champion wins first, then walks into the arena.
author: Jim Fannin

quote: If you don’t see yourself as a winner, then you cannot perform as a winner.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Some of the most memorable paths I've taken have been detours.
author: Toni Sorenson

quote: It takes heart to battle great challenges, great faith to be victorious over them.
author: Wayne Chirisa

quote: Move out of your comfort zone, develop necessary skills and go all out for that much needed advancement!
author: Abhishek Ratna

quote: You thought it would break you in two, but it made you twice as strong.
author: Eleanor Brownn

quote: I yearn not for the easy path, but for the right path. For 'easy' and 'right' are rarely compatible.
author: Craig D. Lounsbrough

quote: Put time and effort to promote your personal brand.
author: Abhishek Ratna

quote: Freedom, I thought, comes only to the successful.
author: Graham Greene

quote: Information is the key to success, anywhere and everywhere. Right information matters the most.
author: Abhishek Ratna

quote: Accept the fact that you are fully responsible for your career.
author: Abhishek Ratna

quote: We experience procrastination as fear. But fear of what?
author: Steven Pressfield

quote: Resources don't last forever. They must either be USED, MANAGED or they will be WASTED.
author: Amos Gideon Buba

quote: Take the easy road and you will feel you have achieved nothing. Try the difficult shit and you’ll enjoy your successes.
author: Michael R. Fletcher

quote: Understand that success is not an accident, but a planned event.
author: Abhishek Ratna

quote: There is always another way; make sure you look in all directions before deciding to give up.
author: Anamika Mishra

quote: Nothing is impossible if someone make it possible.
author: Abid Hussain

quote: Things do not happen TO you. They happen THROUGH you.
author: Gordana Biernat

quote: Failures make character, not success.
author: Abhijit Naskar

quote: A belief is simply a thought that seems true to YOU.
author: Gordana Biernat

quote: It is wiser to love who you are than what you want.
author: Rasheed Ogunlaru

quote: Getting drunk with success and sick with ambition only leads to one route: destruction!
author: Olawale Daniel

quote: Do not judge my success by the destination I reached but the distance I traveled.
author: Majid Kazmi

quote: Having something is not always better than not having it.
author: Beth Kempton

quote: When YOU choose to change, your reality must change accordingly.
author: Gordana Biernat

quote: You can't have favour with God and suffer in life.
author: WISDOM KWASHIE MENSAH

quote: If everything is possible, then it is also possible that something is impossible.
author: Auliq Ice

quote: Where can you find opportunities? Dissect your excuses and you will find them in abundance.
author: T. Jay Taylor

quote: Most people overestimate what they can do in a year and underestimate what they can do in two or three decades.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: In my experience, stress is the cause of all injury and pain.
author: Tobe Hanson

quote: When we face every challenge with optimism, a great attitude is always success.
author: Ron Baratono

quote: You should have goals so big that you are uncomfortable telling your friends about them.
author: Daniel Milstein

quote: None of our achievement matters more than how we have lived our lives.
author: Lailah Gfty Akita

quote: A sure success is the grace to meditate on the scriptures.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: The road to success doesn't allow detours; it's a one-way street.
author: Kyle Vidrine

quote: If you're going to be fighting anyway, why not fight to win and not just to survive.
author: Kyle Vidrine

quote: If you see a shot, shoot.
author: Kyle Vidrine

quote: Behind every successful athlete there is a responsible coach.
author: Paul Bamikole

quote: In order to succeed, you must first dream.
author: Jennifer Coletta

quote: You can either complain about it or grind; I choose to grind.
author: Kyle Vidrine

quote: Life is a continuous learning experience.
author: Ifeanyi Enoch Onuoha

quote: Success is the result of your struggling.
author: Idowu Ayodeji

quote: When you develop yourself, you grow humanity.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: True freedom comes from continuous self-development.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: The success of a man should be measured not by his income but by his tax returns.
author: Haresh Sippy

quote: In reality, there is no highway to success. Therefore, be prepared for difficulties.
author: Eraldo Banovac

quote: Those with Integrity stand alone in Success.
author: Bluenscottish

quote: Rise above the daily stumbles and place your focus on your vision.
author: Bluenscottish

quote: Squabbling over too little is just human nature. But it says a great deal about a person, what they do with abundance.
author: Tessa Dare

quote: A man has a hard time feeling fulfilled when he lives a life that does not serve a purpose more than himself.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Those who expect opportunities to happen will never get as far as those who make opportunities happen.
author: Jennifer Coletta

quote: Mistakes aren’t mistakes; they are lessons!
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Evil is something you need to fight until it ceases trying to control you.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Your success in worldly life is in proportion to your faith and truthfulness!
author: Dada Bhagwan

quote: Unsettling emotions are capable of messing up the most beautiful minds in this world.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Fear kills dreams more than failure.
author: Idowu Ayodeji

quote: The closer you get to your past the sooner you realize it was never present.
author: Bluenscottish

quote: Every obstacle is an opportunity to make success a reality.
author: Bluenscottish

quote: Due to your merit karma, your efforts will bring you success.
author: Dada Bhagwan

quote: We still need to give our best to life even if we do not understand the purpose of our existence.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: At what point is normal natural?
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: The truest feeling of happiness is the security that comes with being loved.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: A good relationship with our children is the ultimate comfort we have while dying.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: There is no bigger gratification than the realization of the things you believe in after overcoming all the odds.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Kindness is a source of relief to the soul.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: The scrupulous survivors in life are the best counterweight to unscrupulous survivors.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Man craves joy far more than anything else in life.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: The narrow-minded find it convenient to create stereotypes.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Stop stalling. Get out of your own way and go for it.
author: Jennifer Coletta

quote: Writers are the most tormented of all the different categories of artists.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: In today’s world, human desires far supersede human needs. Waste is the result of that disparity.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Money does not dictate your lifestyle; it's how you manage your finances that determines it.
author: Wayne Chirisa

quote: Failure is the secret to success because doing it wrong is apart of doing it right.
author: Alicia A. Jennings

quote: Success or failure is largely dependent on the association you build yourself around.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: A yesterday missed can never be found even in a fine tomorrow.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Never take tiny dreams for granted. They contain giant success stories.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: The essence of adversity is to show us the real brave people who can withstand it.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Believe in yourself, keep a can-do approach, struggle hard and watch success follow.
author: Mustafa Saifuddin

quote: A leader’s meal is that unstoppable desire to stay late to see his dreams achieved.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: The purpose of life is to nurture joy, which involves those aspects of humanity that enrich the soul.
author: Janvier Chando

quote: Calamities reveal your capabilities.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: It was one thing to be fooled, and another thing to be taken for a fool all the time.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Love and hate when stretched to their extremes blind reasoning.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Your business values can make you soar above the competition.
author: Doris Perdue-Johnson

quote: The height of your success will be measured with reference to the depth from which you started.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Every small success makes the next big success possible.
author: Del Suggs

quote: Without a continuous struggle, your previous struggles will become a waste.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Your passion is your connection to God.
author: Amit Ray

quote: Passion is the 'not-so-secret' ingredient to success. Passion drives hard work and creativity.
author: Izey Victoria Odiase

quote: Discovering yourself is the major key to being successful.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Today’s success is tomorrow’s mediocrity.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: A leader’s goal is to remain relevant even when time changes.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: You must learn, research and be passionate about new ways of doing things to remain relevant.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: At the end of it all, it is our relationship with people that determines whether they will share in our pain.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Leaders cannot build a successful nation once they are yoked to these two evils, ignorance and greed.
author: Wayne Chirisa

quote: We give up too soon. The sure way to succeed is to endure to the very end.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: Success will only arrive when your actions are strong enough to attract them.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Success is not got in the twinkling of an eye.
author: Akanksha Agrawal

quote: The universe makes it possible. Your mindset makes it probable. Your action makes it reality.
author: Steve Maraboli

quote: In times of failure you are alone. But success brings many friends.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: Life may try to knock you down but be persistent with your passions.
author: Amit Ray

quote: Self-education is open only to those who refuse to live a small and purposeless life.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: When your dream doesn't come true, just go ahead and dream another one!
author: Dr. Lucas D. Shallua

quote: I stopped reading books that talk about organizational success but fail to emphasize the importance of trust.
author: Assegid Habtewold

quote: There are two ways to be rich: One is by acquiring much, and the other is by desiring little.
author: Jackie French Koller

quote: You’ve climbed too many mountains and crossed too many rivers to stop and turn back now.
author: Eleanor Brownn

quote: Do you have a clear written purpose for your life? If not, why don't you make it now?
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: There is no success where there are no secrets.
author: John Kramer

quote: Life is a divine blessing for those who live life to add values in the lives of others.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: You grow in life when you grow your attitude by making it more positive and productive.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: No matter your name or race, you too are fully capable in turning your dreams into realities.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: Success without a successor is a failure.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: Enlightenment is the awareness of something deep within you that is ageless and formless.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: Dream as big as you can and shoot for the stars. Even small baby steps count!
author: Dr. Lucas D. Shallua

quote: Not every good idea is God's perfect will for you.
author: Dr. Lucas D. Shallua

quote: Reality is based mainly on knowledge; what you do not know doesn't exist for you.
author: Dr. Lucas D. Shallua

quote: Blissfulness is the summit of contentment.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Sometimes pride compels us to engage in costly wars when a compromised peace would have been best.
author: Janvier Chouteu-Chando

quote: Rather fail and struggle than succeed and be complacent.
author: Haresh Sippy

quote: Your inner voice is your signboard; follow it.
author: Anamika Mishra

quote: Great things in business are never done by one person; they are done by a team of people.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: What you do today with your time can make the rest of your life worthy and fruitful.
author: Seema Brain Openers

quote: Time utilization and effectiveness is a major marker for success.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Your daily product determines how far you go.
author: Sunday Adelaja

quote: Age is not barrier to or elevator to success; that’s the job of vision.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: You can't avoid success if you disown your fear.
author: Sravani Saha Nakhro

quote: Leadership is a choice: to choose power or empowerment.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: One of the most important lessons a leader can learn is how trust works.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Character makes trust possible and trust makes great leadership possible.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Whatever you will accomplish is restricted by your ability to lead others.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: The greater the impact you want to make, the greater your influence needs to be.
author: Lolly Daskal

quote: Is your appearance representing you well and helping you achieve the results you desire?
author: Susan C. Young

quote: Is your brand consistent and congruent with your desired outcomes?
author: Susan C. Young

quote: Dressing appropriately in one venue may be highly inappropriate in another.
author: Susan C. Young

quote: Poor habits can invalidate your credibility and undermine your success.
author: Susan C. Young

quote: Always take failure as an opinion, never as an option.
author: Johnnie Dent Jr.

quote: Things will happen when they should. When an event is forced, its outcome would be less than optimal.
author: Charbel Tadros

quote: A truly successful person enjoys helping others reach their ambitions.
author: Charbel Tadros

quote: Some people are like popcorn: they will only succeed when under heat or pressure.
author: Charbel Tadros

quote: You cannot reach success only by working hard; you also need to be working smart.
author: Charbel Tadros

quote: Building something that matters is a marathon, not a sprint.
author: Dr. Dragos

quote: Every step we take toward the top is possible because of little steps in the past.
author: Dr. Dragos

quote: You are capable of great things.
author: Jeff Olson

quote: Expressing authentic appreciation doesn’t cost anything and the outcomes are wonderful.
author: Dr. Dragos

quote: Habits are tools. They can either propel you toward success or drag you down.
author: Silvica Rosca

quote: Do your best in the day, for the day, and then work on tomorrow when it comes.
author: Amber Hurdle

quote: With grace, you will succeed despite strong opposition.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: By not stepping into your greatness, you let down everyone whom you could inspire or influence.
author: Amber Hurdle

quote: Don't aim for perfection. Aim for 'better than yesterday'.
author: Izey Victoria Odiase

quote: The magic of life is that wisdom follows a fall and defeat, not a win.
author: Rasheed Ogunlaru

quote: A business is like an automobile. Its people are wheels; their passion is fuel.
author: Ajeet Sharma

quote: A road often travelled has heavy traffic and you take more time to reach the destination.
author: Ajeet Sharma

quote: We are never defeated unless we give up on God.
author: Ronald Reagan

quote: Where there is no integrity, there is no unity.
author: Richie Norton

quote: The will to succeed should be powerful; the willingness to prepare for success is paramount.
author: Kieran Revell

quote: Success is only possible to those whose hearts are willing and ready to embrace hard work.
author: Topsy Gift

quote: Give fear a swift kick in the ass and fire up your dreams.
author: Melody Lee

quote: Those who are determined to succeed are those who eventually succeed.
author: Jeanette Coron

quote: Integrity is the bond of trust.
author: Richie Norton

quote: Tyrants don't become a success.
author: Anthony T. Hincks

quote: Many men go fishing all of their lives without knowing that it is not fish they are after.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: If you don’t fight for your dreams, you won’t earn anything.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Fail early, fail often.
author: Tarun Sharma

quote: Age is neither a limit nor an exception to realize your true potential.
author: Kashaf Shaikh

quote: Success is yours. Ask for it, stand for it, fight for it and go for it.
author: Israelmore Ayivor

quote: Every great endeavour is fueled by great enthusiasm.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: Without failure, there is no success.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita

quote: Dive down into the deepest depth of your soul; there you will find your ocean of wisdom.
author: Jennifer White

quote: Start before you're ready.
author: Mel Robbins

quote: You have been assigned this mountain so that you can show others it can be moved.
author: Mel Robbins

quote: Success does not start at the top; it begins by deciding to get up from the bottom.
author: Ken Poirot

quote: Compulsive drives for success arising from a competitive culture are no less neurotic.
author: Karen Horney

quote: The secret to success is massive execution.
author: Sesan Kareem

quote: Procrastination should not be linked with failure, nor early action with success.
author: Mary Lamia

quote: Today it is cheaper to start a business than tomorrow.
author: Amit Kalantri
